top3.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0) 
   FROM expense e 
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id 
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2019') 
  - 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0) 
   FROM expense e 
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id 
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2020') AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0)
   FROM expense e
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
   WHERE ev.event_date BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2019-12-31') 
  -
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0)
   FROM expense e
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
   WHERE ev.event_date BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2020-12-31') AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0) 
   FROM expense e 
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id 
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2019') 
  - 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0) 
   FROM expense e 
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id 
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2020') AS difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0)
   FROM expense e
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
   WHERE ev.event_date BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2019-12-31') 
  -
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0)
   FROM expense e
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
   WHERE ev.event_date BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2020-12-31') AS difference

SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2019' THEN e.cost ELSE 0 END), 0) 
  - 
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2020' THEN e.cost ELSE 0 END), 0) AS difference
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id;

   FROM expense e 
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id 
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2019')

   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id 
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id

  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0)
   FROM expense e
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
   WHERE ev.event_date BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2019-12-31') 
  -
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0)
   FROM expense e
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
   WHERE ev.event_date BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2020-12-31') AS difference

SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2019' THEN e.cost ELSE 0 END), 0) 
  - 
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2020' THEN e.cost ELSE 0 END), 0) AS difference
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0) 
   FROM expense e 
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id 
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2019') 
  - 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.cost), 0) 
   FROM expense e 
   JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id 
   JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', ev.event_date) = '2020') AS difference
